description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts and practical usage, gauging the learner's ability to articulate CSS expertise on a résumé. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, using a light‑hearted, encouraging tone to motivate further study. The format is multiple‑choice, emphasizing quick recall and applied understanding.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, Modern layout techniques (Flexbox, Grid), Responsive design, CSS preprocessors and tooling, Best practices for styling and maintainability
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and students aiming to validate and showcase their CSS proficiency.
